conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 2, 2020 at 06:31

did.unittitle: Russell M. Logie Archives

corpname.part: Yale Peabody Museum of Natural History

did.abstract: The archives of Russell M. Logie including maps and notebooks encompassing his time at Yale.

prefercite.head: Cite As
prefercite.p: Russell M. Logie Archives, Invertebrate Paleontology, Yale Peabody Museum

bioghist.head: Biographical Sketch
bioghist.p: Yale Grad School ?34; Employer: Peabody Museum. Elected as a member of the Paleontological Society in 1933.

scopecontent.head: Description of the Material
scopecontent.p: Primarily USGS 7.5" topographic quadrangle maps covering New York and eastern Pennsylvania published between 1891 and 1933. Also a sketch map of New York showing the location of many localities. Also four field notebooks from New York dated 1931-1933; assorted stratigraphic sections, charts and reports; and correspondence.

did.unittitle: Maps

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Topographic Maps of NY, PA & NJ.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Miscellaneous Archives including correspondence and Stratigraphic information.
